<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/planningUnit/realmCountry/{realmCountryId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a list of all planning units attached to a supply plan for a specific realm country

  as={"h2"}
